summary: Tested Option C (Tiles + Dedicated subcategory page + enhanced filters) end-to-end. Backend pytest 11/11 PASS in test_subcategory_and_facets.py (tile shape, 404, count delta, taxonomy order, min_rating 4/6/0, min_discount_pct 25/50/0/150, flash-sale intersection). Frontend Playwright 12/12 PASS: /category/Electronics renders 'Shop by subcategory' tile grid with 9 tiles; tapping Audio routes to /category/Electronics/Audio; breadcrumb shows 'Categories › Electronics › Audio'; back-button, Refine filter btn, and 9-chip sibling row all present; tapping a sibling (Phones & Accessories) replaces route and updates breadcrumb; filter sheet contains NEW 'Customer review' (4★+/3★+/2★+/1★+) and 'Deals & discount' (10%+/25%+/50%+/70%+) sections; legacy /category/{name} chips now route to /category/{name}/{subcategory} while 'All' chip continues to show the tile grid. Only minor non-blocking RN-Web console warnings observed.

issues: Many subcategory tiles render the 2-letter initial placeholder (e.g. 'PH' for Phones & Accessories, 'SM' for Smart Home) because their sample_image is null. Not a bug (this is the documented fallback), but if the catalog has products in those subcategories the backend tile aggregator could not find a sample image — worth verifying that the aggregator picks ANY product image, not only ones with image_url present.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. These come from third-party components (lucide-react-native / RN built-ins) and are non-blocking on web, but should be tracked for the next RN-Web upgrade.

action_items: (Optional) Investigate why some subcategory tiles fall back to the 2-letter placeholder — confirm the tile aggregator is picking up product images for every subcategory that has at least one product.
(Optional / future) Track react-native-web 'shadow*' and 'pointerEvents' deprecation warnings for a later RN-Web upgrade.
critical_code_review_comments: SubcategoryTileGrid.tsx and app/category/[name]/[subcategory].tsx look clean: testIDs are present and well-namespaced, router.replace is used correctly for sibling-chip swap to avoid stack growth, and breadcrumb is keyboard/tap accessible.
Code reuse between /category/[name].tsx and /category/[name]/[subcategory].tsx is high (SortFilterSheet, ProductCard, SizeGuideModal shared). No duplicated business logic flagged.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest seeds and cleans up temporary test products + flash sales (prefixed 'prod_test_' / 'fs_test_') via _seed_product / _cleanup helpers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file lives at /app/backend/tests/test_subcategory_and_facets.py. New routes: GET /api/categories/{name}/subcategories; new product facets ?min_rating= and ?min_discount_pct=. New Expo Router screens: /app/frontend/app/category/[name]/[subcategory].tsx (dedicated subcat page) and /app/frontend/src/components/SubcategoryTileGrid.tsx (tile grid). Legacy /category/[name].tsx chips now navigate (router.push) to the subcategory route rather than setting in-page state — only the 'All' chip is in-page.
